item.title: Fast Skills Audit & Gap Plan 🚀 • List top 10 skills needed in your field. • Rate your proficiency in each skill 1-5. • Identify skills rated 3 or below. • Research resources to improve weak skills. • Create a 1-week action plan for improvement. What skills will you focus on to boost your career potential? #career #skills #ScalePilot #SocialPilot #AIAutomations
item.description: Fast Skills Audit & Gap Plan 🚀 • List top 10 skills needed in your field. • Rate your proficiency in each skill 1-5. • Identify skills rated 3 or below. • Research resources to improve weak skills. • Create a 1-week action plan for improvement. What skills will you focus on to boost your career potential? #career #skills #ScalePilot #SocialPilot #AIAutomations
